div.p: Submit your resignation request with required details below

div.div:
You already have an active resignation request.
Reference: — Status:
View Request

div.p: Please ensure you have read the company's resignation policy before submitting. Once submitted, your request will be reviewed by HR. You cannot edit a submitted request.

textarea.name: reason
textarea.placeholder: Please provide your reason for resignation in detail...

textarea.name: additional_notes
textarea.placeholder: Any pending tasks, handover plan or special instructions for HR...

label.small: Resigning to pursue a new role or career path
Giving extra lead time for a smooth handover
Role scope was not as anticipated

div.label: I confirm that I wish to resign from my position and understand this action will be forwarded to HR for review.

ul.li: Submit request at least 30 days before your last working day
HR will review and respond within 3–5 business days
Download your resignation letter after submission
Contact HR directly for urgent matters
You cannot edit a request once submitted

div.p: Contact HR for any queries regarding your resignation process.

p.t: Your request has been received and is pending HR review.
HR is currently reviewing your resignation request.
Your resignation has been approved. Last working date:
Your request was rejected. See HR notes below.

div.t-attf-class: tracker-dot #{resign.state == 'rejected' and step[0] == 'hr_review' and 'rejected' or (cur_order >= this_order and 'done' or '') }
tracker-label #{resign.state == step[0] and 'active' or (cur_order > this_order and 'done' or '') }

span.t-esc: dict([('new_opportunity','New Opportunity'),('advance_notice','Advance Notice'),('not_good_fit','Not a Good Fit')]).get(resign.pdf_template,'—')

a.onclick: return confirm('Are you sure you want to cancel this resignation request?')

ul.li: HR will review your request within 3–5 working days
You'll receive a notification upon approval
Download your resignation letter below anytime
Prepare a handover plan for your responsibilities
Return company assets before your last day
Review HR notes in the details section
You may submit a new resignation request if needed

strong.t-esc: dict([('new_opportunity','Resignation – New Opportunity'),('advance_notice','Resignation – Advance Notice'),('not_good_fit','Resignation – Not a Good Fit')]).get(resign.pdf_template,'Resignation Letter')
